hero.title: Simple, <accent>transparent</accent> pricing
hero.description: Compliance-ready invoicing for global teams. Multi-currency, audit-ready, with hash-chained immutable records — start free and scale as you grow.

faq.title: Frequently asked <accent>questions</accent>
faq.description: Everything you need to know about pricing and billing.

freeTier.question: Is there a free tier?
freeTier.answer: Yes! Our Starter tier is completely free — you can send up to 5 invoices per month with hash-chained audit trails, an invoice verification portal for your clients, multi-currency support, and smart invoice numbering. Upgrade to Pro ($29/mo) or SME ($129/mo) for unlimited invoices and advanced features.

upgradeDowngrade.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
upgradeDowngrade.answer: Absolutely. You can change your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be prorated. When downgrading, your new rate starts at the next billing cycle.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and can arrange invoicing for annual Business plans.

security.question: Is my financial data secure?
security.answer: Your security is our priority. We use bank-level encryption, hash-chained immutable audit logs, and are fully compliant with data protection regulations. Every invoice can be cryptographically verified through our public invoice verification portal.

starterIncludes.question: What's included in the free Starter plan?
starterIncludes.answer: Starter includes 5 invoices and 5 receipts per month, 1 currency account, 1 business, and 1 team member. You also get enterprise-grade features: hash-chained audit trails for regulatory compliance, a public invoice verification portal to build client trust, multi-currency invoicing with integrated exchange rates, and smart invoice numbering with customizable prefixes.

eInvoicingCoverage.question: Do you support e-invoicing for my country?
eInvoicingCoverage.answer: Our Business tier (Biz) supports e-invoicing for Italy (FatturaPA), Poland (KSeF), Germany (ZUGFeRD/XRechnung), and PEPPOL network integration for cross-border compliance in Europe, Australia, and beyond. We also support VAT-compliant invoicing for UK, France, Spain, Belgium, and many other jurisdictions with our jurisdiction-aware tax engine.

cta.title: Ready to get <accent>started?</accent>
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses who trust Invoicemonk for their invoicing needs.
